text.content: 4 circles appear, each containing 2 dots. Semi-abstract visual.

rich_text.plain_text: 4 circles appear, each containing 2 dots. Semi-abstract visual.

text.content: "Alright, circles. Figure out the groups, then pick the expression that matches."

rich_text.plain_text: "Alright, circles. Figure out the groups, then pick the expression that matches."

text.content:
tool: multiple_choice  options: ["4 × 2", "2 × 4", "4 + 2", "2 + 4"]
"Which expression shows this?"
